name: Taipei
author: ryandicicco
description: Custom map of the Taipei-New Taipei metro area featuring ~324k satellite/GBA-detected building footprints injected into PMTiles vector tiles alongside existing OSM data (with deduplication of 190k overlapping buildings). Demand data generated from official Taiwan government district-level population statistics with tuned gravity model; nearby points merged to produce realistic modal split. Includes Taoyuan International Airport (TPE) and Songshan Airport (TSA), major universities (NTU, NCCU), and neighborhood labels (English-preferred via sb-label-adder). Population ~7M covering Taipei City and surrounding New Taipei districts.
